name: community contribution validator requires an eval_evidence field on every entry
command:
mkdir -p community/sources && printf 'id: x
contributor: alice
review_status: pending
license: MIT
' > community/sources/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/validate.sh" --entry community/sources/x.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*eval_evidence' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
